Off Calendar Jul-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jordan C. Behmke, Esq., Mosaic Law PC (408) 987-6399 jcb@mosaiclawusa.com Attorneys for Plaintiff and Cross-Defendants A & A General Building Construction Inc.
Seth W. Wiener, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF SETH W. WIENER (925) 487-5607 seth@sethwienerlaw.com Attorney for Defendants and Cross-Complainants Arlene S. Tasim and Ali Tasim

Motion not properly/timely contested by parties. No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARLENE TASIM AND ALI TASIM'S Motion For Sanctions Against A A General Building Construction Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1281.99.

Defendants and Cross-Complainants' unopposed Motion for Sanctions in the amount of $8350.00 is granted (CCP section 1281.99), payment to be made within 30 days of the filing of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
